description: An elm is 'welamu', a deciduous tree in the genus conventionally called *Ulmus*. A botanical or local name can identify the species or hybrid. 'shiro' (tree) is the wider word.
articulatory_notes: Rounded 'w' glides into front 'e'. The tongue settles at the alveolar ridge for stressed lateral 'la', after which the lips meet for nasal 'm' and open onto high-back rounded 'u'.
usage_notes: Counts may use optional 'lipha'. Tree parts follow the usual pattern: 'welamu loremi' is an elm branch and 'welamu koremu' its bark.

semantic_domains.nature: an elm tree, with exact species supplied when needed
